Okay. So here’s another really cool thing. I think this is super telling. So I just
was talking about the Goodwill angle that I liked and how that was something
I could riff on pretty well, which I can. I actually opened this one. First, we
have this part, “After a 5 decade long tug-of-war with yo-yo dieting, I finally
have the confidence to clean out my closet of clothing I haven’t worn in at
least a year, as well as too baggy clothes.” What was great and this is really
important because if you’re looking at these non-scale victories, which I’m
enjoying, there’s a bunch of them.
(00:00:39)
“Cake Has No Power Here!” which I wrote down and basically, it’s really good.
Basically, this woman was cutting leftover birthday cake for her daughter
and she realized that she has no interest in it and it might as well have been
Styrofoam. It’s not just that she has willpower, self-control. She literally has
zero; big zero on the crave-o-meter, nothing. A few months ago, it would
have been torture to look at that cake without eating it. “It’s embarrassing to
admit, but a few months ago, I would have snuck down when everybody else
was asleep and cut a couple of thin slices away from any letters or words so
nobody would notice.” This chick has done that. When you know about this,
that is professional. “And gorged on it like it was the last crumbs of sugar on
earth. I’ve only been on keto for about six weeks. It’s hard to explain. It feels
great. I had a huge weight lifted off to not have sugar cravings or feel like I’d
need to hide eating something. It makes me really happy.”

“I’m wearing a 25-year-old sweater while I type this.” I like this one thing. She’s

heavier jeans, but now she doesn’t and she’s wearing 1990s clothing, which
is a size 12 and up next 1980 size 10. That’s super cool and it’s nice to see
her with that smile, too. 1995 skirt. Sounds really nice. It makes me feel good.

through here.
(00:06:14)
Look at this guy. Frankly, he’s baggy. Good for him. I have to wear suspenders

getting out of the plus size section was so joyous. Last summer she went to
the department store to buy some new shorts and she never bought clothes
at this department store because she would always shop at plus size places
